creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
If the port is build WITH_VDA defined, then the distinfo needs to
contain references to the VDA patch files.  This is, of course, if the
VDA patch compiles properly with 2.3.19.  If not, then the port needs to
be set to IGNORE= in case WITH_VDA is defined.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
